ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' OCR'd as '試験にはつしが出る！' — mascot badge text 'コレ' misread as 'つし'

Diagram label text inside RAID striping/mirroring boxes (ディスクA, ディスクB, numbered block labels 1-6, arrow annotations '鏡のように同じデータ', 'データをストライプ綿々にする', 'ディスクが1つでも壊れると動作しなくなる', '1つのディスクが壊れても動作し続ける') all replaced by image placeholders — diagram content not transcribed

reviewer_notes: Main body prose and bullet-point exam summary are faithfully captured. The two diagram figures are replaced by image references with no textual content, which is expected behavior for complex figures but the labeled annotations within the RAID diagrams are lost. Mascot badge 'コレ' repeatedly OCR'd as 'つし' — a recurring low-severity wrong_char issue across pages.
